---
title: Single author, single structured affiliation
format:
  jss-pdf:
    keep-tex: true
author:
  - name: Alice Researcher
    orcid: 0000-0000-0000-0001
    email: alice@acme.edu
    url: https://alice.example
    affiliations:
      - name: ACME University
        department: Department of Foo
        group: Foo Research Group
        address: 123 Main Street
        city: Springfield
        region: IL
        country: USA
        postal-code: "62701"
keywords: [test]
---

Test body paragraph.
